Home»Sport»Paris Olympics 2024»New tickets for Paris Olympics 2024 to be released

Fans will have a new chance to buy 250 000 new tickets for the Paris Olympics 2024 next week – but they will need to be quick!

Fans will have a new chance to buy tickets for theParis Olympics2024next week with another250 000places set to be released, chief organiserTony Estanguetsaid on Wednesday.

“Next week, on April 17 at 10:00, we will put 250 000 new tickets on sale for all sports, all price categories and for all competition sites,” Estanguet told reporters.

Following criticism of high prices during previous releases, he said that half of them would be sold for under €100 (R2 016).

A total of 10 000 tickets for gymnastics will be made available, with 15 000 for swimming, 12 000 for tennis and 35 000 for beach volleyball, which is set to be played in a temporary stadium in front of the Eiffel Tower.

“You’ll have to be quick,” Estanguet warned, adding that the vast majority of tickets – 7.9 million in total – had already been sold.

Two-thirds of previous buyers were French, but people from 150 different countries have also secured tickets, according to the organising committee.

TheParis Olympicsare set to take place fromJuly 26-August 11followed by the Paralympics from August 28-September 8.

By Garrin Lambley © Agence France-Presse
